description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe with a bold, angular design and a multi-layered sole that transitions from black at the base to a gradient of green and yellow. The upper is primarily white with black and green accents, featuring a unique system of black criss-cross straps over traditional green laces for added security and style. The side panels display a motivational phrase and a prominent black Nike Swoosh logo, while the heel also features a smaller Swoosh. The toe area is reinforced with a perforated protective cap, and the midsole has a geometric, textured pattern for visual interest and grip. The shoe appears robust and is likely designed for urban environments, offering both comfort and durability.
description: A futuristic white and green athletic shoe with black criss-cross straps, a gradient sole, and prominent Nike branding. The design features geometric textures, motivational text, and a reinforced perforated toe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black criss-cross straps, green laces, perforated toe cap, and the angular shape of the sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the motivational text, layered gradient sole, and the strap system crossing the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel tab, a small black Nike Swoosh, and the layered construction of the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view features the large black Nike Swoosh, geometric midsole texture, and the full extent of the criss-cross straps.
attribute_logo: Black Nike Swoosh on both sides and heel; all logos are black and smoothly integrated into the upper and heel.
